instructions: Baseline Test 03 - Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics
JEE Preparation: Benchmark (mixed difficulty)
1. Login: Enter your NAME IN CAPITAL LETTERS and Roll No exactly as given by the school
2. Timer: Once you login, the test timer will appear on screen. Test will close automatically after the time ends
3. Changing Answers: You can change any option before final submit. To remove your selected option, click 'Clear' and choose again.
Total Duration: 60 minutes
Each correct answer: +4
Each wrong answer: -1
No negative marks for unattempted questions
Each subject (Physics – 12, Chemistry – 12, Mathematics – 12) contains 36 MCQ questions
Do not refresh the page during the exam
The exam will be automatically submitted when the time is over
Timer will auto submit
* Unic Academy - Building Clarity, Creating Confidence, Delivering Results
